recommendations.title: A Walk to Remember

recommendations.title: Empire of the Sun

recommendations.title: Love & Other Drugs
recommendations.overview: Maggie is an alluring free spirit who won't let anyone – or anything – tie her down. But she meets her match in Jamie, whose relentless and nearly infallible charm serves him well with the ladies and the cutthroat world of pharmaceutical sales. Maggi

recommendations.title: Jamie Marks Is Dead
recommendations.overview: No one seemed to care about Jamie Marks until after his death. Hoping to find the love and friendship he never had in life, Jamie’s ghost visits former classmate Adam McCormick, drawing him into the bleak world between the living and the dead.

recommendations.title: Star
recommendations.overview: When Crystal Wyatt was 16 her father passed away. From that time her life would never be the same. Crystal is banished from the family ranch, and starts a new life as a singer in a San Francisco nightclub.

recommendations.title: River's Edge
